title: Nikkei index surpasses 70,000 points for first time in history
summary: The Tokyo stock exchange reaches a new record driven by the agreement between the United States and Iran and market optimism.

title: DAZN suspends new subscriptions to its annual football plan after criticism over prices
summary: The sports streaming platform faces criticism over the way it displays fees.

title: Nidec shareholders harshly criticize management over accounting scandal
summary: At the general meeting, accountability was demanded from founder Nagamori for financial fraud.

title: Driver who ran over and killed a 9-month pregnant woman sentenced to prison
summary: The court also considered the harm to the fetus, and the victim's husband expressed relief at the sentence.

title: Renowned rakugoka Shinkirō Ryūgyoku dies at 53
summary: The master of classical rakugo and horror stories died due to heart failure.

title: United States and Iran sign 14-point memorandum to reduce tensions
summary: The agreement aims to curb Iran's nuclear program, although doubts persist about its implementation.

title: 33-year-old woman fatally stabbed in her home while her children slept
summary: A friend of the victim confessed to the crime and called the police, according to authorities.

title: Lower House constitutional committee approves reform of Referendum Law
summary: The amendment aims to unify the requirements for polling witnesses with the election law.

title: Toyota recalls 160,000 Sienta units due to seat belt defects
summary: The defect could prevent the seat belt alarm from functioning properly.

title: Landslide in Kokonoe, Oita, destroys a home and leaves a woman injured
summary: Rescue teams managed to free the victim who was trapped under the rubble.

title: Former company employee given suspended sentence for entering US military base in Yokosuka
summary: The Yokohama court handed down a conditional sentence to the man who confessed his admiration for the military.

title: Prime Minister Takaichi seeks to consolidate power with meetings and nods to opposition
summary: At the G7 summit and in meetings with opposition leaders, the premier aims to strengthen his base.

title: Osaka replaces Chinese electric buses with national diesel in autonomous driving tests
summary: The pilot project for the 2025 World Expo changes supplier amid technical challenges.

title: Takefusa Kubo misses Japan national team practice due to illness
summary: The Real Sociedad forward recovers at the hotel while a replacement is sought for the match against Tunisia.

title: Federal Reserve revises its forecasts and anticipates a rate hike amid inflation
summary: The change in stance contrasts with President Trump's wishes, who criticizes the measure.

title: Yen weakens to 160 yen per dollar amid expectations of US rate hike
summary: The Japanese currency falls to its lowest level in months, trading in the high 160 range.

title: Trump wields unilateral leadership at G7 while Europe shows its autonomy
summary: The US president appears euphoric at the summit, but his style draws criticism among allies.

title: Mie moves forward with ordinance against customer harassment with penalties, but raises doubts among legislators
summary: Meanwhile, the prefectural government reconsiders hiring foreigners due to uncertainty.

title: Bear enters a golf course in Japan as 40 people watch
summary: Authorities intensify hunter training to deal with increasing bear encounters.

title: New fraud schemes detected: from scams based in Cambodia to military impersonation
summary: Victims are deceived into sending large sums of money through social media and phone calls.
